languages.text: Губернатор Ведка Дунавски оказалась не в силах принять измену своего Лорда-капитана. Семь долгих лет ей удавалось оборонять Зарков от сил Хаоса, но с каждой битвой она теряла все больше веры. В конце седьмого года Ведка бесследно исчезла из своего кабинета — в дни, когда армию Заркова поразила невиданная ранее смертельная болезнь. Говорят, вскоре после этого на Заркове появилась ужасающая жрица темных сил, одноглазая, покрытая язвами Разбивающая Надежды, что отвращала души праведных от Бога-Императора речами о спасении в отчаянии.

Governor Vedka Dunawski found herself unable to accept the betrayal of her Lord Captain. For seven long years, she successfully defended Zarkov against the forces of Chaos, but with each battle she lost more and more faith. At the end of the seventh year, Vedka disappeared from her office without a trace — mere days before the Zarkov army was struck by a deadly disease that had never been seen before. It is said that shortly afterward, a horrifying priestess of the dark powers appeared on Zarkov — the one-eyed, ulcer-riddled Hope Breaker, who turned the souls of the righteous away from the God-Emperor with her words of salvation in despair.

languages.text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキー総督は、自分の主である船長が裏切ったことに耐えられなかった。7年の長きに渡り、彼女は混沌の軍勢からザルコフを守り抜いたが、戦いのたびに信仰は薄れていった。7年目の終わり、ヴェドカは跡形もなく姿を消した。ザルコフ軍が今まで見たことのない恐ろしい病に襲われるわずか数日前のことだった。その後、ザルコフに現れたのは、恐怖に満ちた暗黒の巫女、希望を砕く者。彼女は、絶望の救済の言葉で、正義の魂を皇帝神から引き離した。
languages.original_text: Governor Vedka Dunawski found herself unable to accept the betrayal of her Lord Captain. For seven long years, she successfully defended Zarkov against the forces of Chaos, but with each battle she lost more and more faith. At the end of the seventh year, Vedka disappeared from her office without a trace — mere days before the Zarkov army was struck by a deadly disease that had never been seen before. It is said that shortly afterward, a horrifying priestess of the dark powers appeared on Zarkov — the one-eyed, ulcer-riddled Hope Breaker, who turned the souls of the righteous away from the God-Emperor with her words of salvation in despair.

traits.locale_text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキー総督は、自分の主である船長が裏切ったことに耐えられなかった。7年の長きに渡り、彼女は混沌の軍勢からザルコフを守り抜いたが、戦いのたびに信仰は薄れていった。7年目の終わり、ヴェドカは跡形もなく姿を消した。ザルコフ軍が今まで見たことのない恐ろしい病に襲われるわずか数日前のことだった。その後、ザルコフに現れたのは、恐怖に満ちた暗黒の巫女、希望を砕く者。彼女は、絶望の救済の言葉で、正義の魂を皇帝神から引き離した。

languages.text: 总督薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡无法接受舰长大人的背叛。她成功抵御混沌军队对扎尔科夫的入侵，长达七年之久。但每一次战斗都在蚕食她的信念。第七年末，薇德卡从办公室离奇失踪——仅仅数日后，一场前所未见的致命瘟疫便席卷了扎尔科夫驻军。据说，不久之后，扎尔科夫出现了一位可怖的黑暗女祭司，那是一位独眼、满身溃疡的“绝望魔女”。她用那绝望的救赎之语，使得一个又一个正义的灵魂背弃神皇。
languages.original_text: Governor Vedka Dunawski found herself unable to accept the betrayal of her Lord Captain. For seven long years, she successfully defended Zarkov against the forces of Chaos, but with each battle she lost more and more faith. At the end of the seventh year, Vedka disappeared from her office without a trace — mere days before the Zarkov army was struck by a deadly disease that had never been seen before. It is said that shortly afterward, a horrifying priestess of the dark powers appeared on Zarkov — the one-eyed, ulcer-riddled Hope Breaker, who turned the souls of the righteous away from the God-Emperor with her words of salvation in despair.

traits.locale_text: 总督薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡无法接受舰长大人的背叛。她成功抵御混沌军队对扎尔科夫的入侵，长达七年之久。但每一次战斗都在蚕食她的信念。第七年末，薇德卡从办公室离奇失踪——仅仅数日后，一场前所未见的致命瘟疫便席卷了扎尔科夫驻军。据说，不久之后，扎尔科夫出现了一位可怖的黑暗女祭司，那是一位独眼、满身溃疡的“绝望魔女”。她用那绝望的救赎之语，使得一个又一个正义的灵魂背弃神皇。

languages.text: La gouverneure Vedka Dunawski fut incapable d'accepter la trahison de {mf|son seigneur-capitaine|sa seigneure-capitaine}. Elle réussit à défendre Zarkov contre les forces du Chaos pendant sept ans de combat acharné, mais sa foi l'abandonnait un peu plus à chaque bataille. À la fin de la septième année, Vedka disparut de son bureau sans laisser de trace, quelques jours à peine avant que l'armée de Zarkov ne fût frappée par une maladie mortelle encore jamais vue. On raconte qu'une terrifiante prêtresse des puissances du mal fit son apparition sur Zarkov peu après : la Destructrice d'espoir, borgne et couverte d'ulcères, qui détournait les âmes vertueuses de l'Empereur-Dieu en leur promettant le salut dans ces heures désespérées.
languages.original_text: Governor Vedka Dunawski found herself unable to accept the betrayal of her Lord Captain. For seven long years, she successfully defended Zarkov against the forces of Chaos, but with each battle she lost more and more faith. At the end of the seventh year, Vedka disappeared from her office without a trace — mere days before the Zarkov army was struck by a deadly disease that had never been seen before. It is said that shortly afterward, a horrifying priestess of the dark powers appeared on Zarkov — the one-eyed, ulcer-riddled Hope Breaker, who turned the souls of the righteous away from the God-Emperor with her words of salvation in despair.

Elle réussit à défendre Zarkov contre les forces du Chaos pendant sept ans de combat acharné, mais sa foi l'abandonnait un peu plus à chaque bataille. À la fin de la septième année, Vedka disparut de son bureau sans laisser de trace, quelques jours à peine avant que l'armée de Zarkov ne fût frappée par une maladie mortelle encore jamais vue. On raconte qu'une terrifiante prêtresse des puissances du mal fit son apparition sur Zarkov peu après : la Destructrice d'espoir, borgne et couverte d'ulcères, qui détournait les âmes vertueuses de l'Empereur-Dieu en leur promettant le salut dans ces heures désespérées.

languages.text: La gobernadora Vedka Dunawski se vio incapaz de aceptar la traición de su Lord Capitán. Durante siete largos años, defendió Zarkov con éxito ante las fuerzas del Caos, pero en cada batalla perdía más fe. Al final del séptimo año, Vedka desapareció de su despacho sin dejar rastro, solo unos días antes de que el ejército de Zarkov sufriera los horrores de una enfermedad letal nunca antes vista. Se cuenta que, poco después, apareció una espantosa sacerdotisa de los Poderes Ruinosos en Zarkov: la Quebradora de Esperanza, tuerta y cubierta de úlceras, que apartaba a las almas justas del Dios Emperador con sus palabras sobre la salvación de la desesperación.
languages.original_text: Governor Vedka Dunawski found herself unable to accept the betrayal of her Lord Captain. For seven long years, she successfully defended Zarkov against the forces of Chaos, but with each battle she lost more and more faith. At the end of the seventh year, Vedka disappeared from her office without a trace — mere days before the Zarkov army was struck by a deadly disease that had never been seen before. It is said that shortly afterward, a horrifying priestess of the dark powers appeared on Zarkov — the one-eyed, ulcer-riddled Hope Breaker, who turned the souls of the righteous away from the God-Emperor with her words of salvation in despair.

traits.locale_text: La gobernadora Vedka Dunawski se vio incapaz de aceptar la traición de su Lord Capitán. Durante siete largos años, defendió Zarkov con éxito ante las fuerzas del Caos, pero en cada batalla perdía más fe. Al final del séptimo año, Vedka desapareció de su despacho sin dejar rastro, solo unos días antes de que el ejército de Zarkov sufriera los horrores de una enfermedad letal nunca antes vista. Se cuenta que, poco después, apareció una espantosa sacerdotisa de los Poderes Ruinosos en Zarkov: la Quebradora de Esperanza, tuerta y cubierta de úlceras, que apartaba a las almas justas del Dios Emperador con sus palabras sobre la salvación de la desesperación.

languages.text: Vali Vedka Dunawski, Lord Kaptan'ın ihanetini kabullenemedi. Yedi uzun yıl boyunca Zarkov'u Kaos güçlerine karşı başarıyla savundu ancak her savaşta inancını giderek yitirdi. Yedinci yılın sonunda Vedka, Zarkov ordusu daha önce hiç görülmemiş ölümcül bir hastalığın pençesine düşmeden sadece birkaç gün önce iz bırakmadan kayboldu. Söylentiye göre kısa bir süre sonra Zarkov'da karanlık güçlerin, çaresizlik içindeki kurtuluş sözleriyle doğruların ruhlarını Tanrı İmparator'dan uzaklaştıran tek gözlü, ülserlerle kaplı Umut Kıran bir rahibesi ortaya çıktı.
languages.original_text: Governor Vedka Dunawski found herself unable to accept the betrayal of her Lord Captain. For seven long years, she successfully defended Zarkov against the forces of Chaos, but with each battle she lost more and more faith. At the end of the seventh year, Vedka disappeared from her office without a trace — mere days before the Zarkov army was struck by a deadly disease that had never been seen before. It is said that shortly afterward, a horrifying priestess of the dark powers appeared on Zarkov — the one-eyed, ulcer-riddled Hope Breaker, who turned the souls of the righteous away from the God-Emperor with her words of salvation in despair.

Söylentiye göre kısa bir süre sonra Zarkov'da karanlık güçlerin, çaresizlik içindeki kurtuluş sözleriyle doğruların ruhlarını Tanrı İmparator'dan uzaklaştıran tek gözlü, ülserlerle kaplı Umut Kıran bir rahibesi ortaya çıktı.

languages.text: Gouverneurin Vedka Dunawski war nicht in der Lage, den Verrat ihres Lord Captains zu akzeptieren. Sie verteidigte Zarkov sieben lange Jahre lang gegen die Mächte des Chaos, aber ihr Glaube schwand von Schlacht zu Schlacht. Am Ende des siebten Jahres verschwand Vedka spurlos aus ihrem Büro ... wenige Tage, bevor die Armee von Zarkov von einer tödlichen neuen Krankheit befallen wurde. Angeblich traf kurz darauf eine Furcht erregende Priesterin der dunklen Künste auf Zarkov ein ... die einäugige, von Geschwüren gezeichnete Hoffnungsbrecherin, durch deren Erlösungsversprechen sich die Rechtschaffenen vom Gottimperator abwandten.
languages.original_text: Governor Vedka Dunawski found herself unable to accept the betrayal of her Lord Captain. For seven long years, she successfully defended Zarkov against the forces of Chaos, but with each battle she lost more and more faith. At the end of the seventh year, Vedka disappeared from her office without a trace — mere days before the Zarkov army was struck by a deadly disease that had never been seen before. It is said that shortly afterward, a horrifying priestess of the dark powers appeared on Zarkov — the one-eyed, ulcer-riddled Hope Breaker, who turned the souls of the righteous away from the God-Emperor with her words of salvation in despair.
